title: tribulus longipetalus subsp. macropterus
intro: Tribulus longipetalus subsp. macropterus is a plant species that belongs to the Tribulus genus, commonly known as puncture vine or caltrop. It is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and diuretic effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing blood pressure, improving kidney function, and alleviating symptoms of menopause and andropause. Tribulus longipetalus subsp. macropterus is often used in herbal preparations, such as capsules, tablets, and teas, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
